case_description: Bag reference video replication case: premium handbag TikTok ecommerce hook based on the uploaded bag video skeleton.

inputs.source_note: User provided bag reference video frozen for regression case creation.

project.name: case-002-bag-reference-replication
project.notes: Bag reference video replication case: premium handbag TikTok ecommerce hook based on the uploaded bag video skeleton.

sequence.persuasive_goal: Make the handbag feel premium, versatile, and worth clicking within the first seconds.

spu.prompt_text: Create a 9:16 TikTok ecommerce product video segment inspired by the uploaded bag reference video. Show a premium structured handbag as the hero product, with smooth handheld push-in, zipper and stitching close-ups, clean product handling, a brief styling moment, and boutique lighting. Keep the bag centered and desirable, no text overlay, no visible brand logo, realistic materials, polished social commerce look.
spu.negative_prompt_text: blurry, warped bag shape, broken zipper, extra straps, fake logos, watermark, captions, text overlay, low quality, distorted hands

visual_constraints.camera: smooth handheld push-in, detail close-ups, elegant product handling

vbu.script_text: This is the everyday bag that makes your outfit look instantly polished. Clean structure, practical space, and premium details made for workdays, weekends, and everything in between.
